javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
Interface NetworkConnection

All Superinterfaces:
AllocationEventNotifier, Joinable, JoinableContainer, JoinEventNotifier, MediaObject, ResourceContainer, java.io.Serializable
public interface NetworkConnection
extends JoinableContainer, ResourceContainer

A NetworkConnection is a JoinableContainer that drives network media ports.
Usually it does this with a SdpPortManager internal Resource.
The SdpPortManager handles multiple streams, if needed: an audio and a video stream, for example.

A NetworkConnection can be created with MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(Configuration) (see also the other versions of this method, in MediaSession).
Example: 

  NetworkConnection myNC = myMediaSession.createNetworkConnection(NetworkConnection.BASIC);

Nested Class Summary
 
Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable
Joinable.Direction
 
Field Summary
static Configuration<NetworkConnection> BASIC
          This config contains only the basic resource to connect to the media network, usually a SdpPortManager.
static Configuration<NetworkConnection> DTMF_CONVERSION
          Contains what BASIC contains, plus a SignalDetector and a SignalGenerator for forwarding DTMFs carried by the signaling channel (advanced feature).
static Configuration<NetworkConnection> ECHO_CANCEL
          Contains what BASIC contains, plus an echo canceler feature

MEDIAOBJECT_ID

Field Detail

BASIC

static final Configuration<NetworkConnection> BASIC
This config contains only the basic resource to connect to the media network, usually a SdpPortManager.

ECHO_CANCEL

static final Configuration<NetworkConnection> ECHO_CANCEL
Contains what BASIC contains, plus an echo canceler feature

DTMF_CONVERSION

static final Configuration<NetworkConnection> DTMF_CONVERSION
Contains what BASIC contains, plus a SignalDetector and a SignalGenerator for forwarding DTMFs carried by the signaling channel (advanced feature).
Those Resources can be accessed with ResourceContainer.getResource(Class).

Method Detail

getSdpPortManager

SdpPortManager getSdpPortManager()
                                 throws MsControlException
Shortcut for getResource(SdpPortManager.class);

Throws:
MsControlException - if the NetworkConnection contains no SdpPortManager.
